name: Sour Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tomatoes into bite-size pieces.
2. Place the chopped tomatoes in a mixing bowl and season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
4. Crush parsley flakes and tarragon and sprinkle over the tomatoes, mixing well.
5. Pour vegetable oil over the tomatoes and mix thoroughly.
6. Mix vinegar and sugar until the sugar is dissolved.
7. Pour the vinegar and sugar mixture over the tomatoes.
8. Place the bowl in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
